description: Style NoteCrafted from pure leather, this fossil belt has a refined finish complemented by its smart gunmetal buckle. Fossil leather breathes, regulates temperature to suit the climate, prevents dust penetration and has high ripping resistance that makes it a must-have in your wardrobe!Product DetailsThick brown belt with a single pronged tang claspHas a fixed loop near the buckleMetal eyelets to customise the FitMaterial and CareLeatherUse a brass polish to maintain buckle shineUse a branded leather conditioner to protect the belt
